summary: A NewsNation studio 'DEVELOPING STORY' segment with two anchors and an inset clip of an agent in Charlotte, NC, covering the dispute over alleged racial profiling in ICE raids ('GOV STEIN: ICE CRACKDOWN IS STOKING FEAR'). It is a cable-news segment, not produced entertainment or music-driven, so out of scope.
notable_text: NEWS NATION; DEVELOPING STORY: DHS TARGETS SANCTUARY CITIES IN ICE RAIDS; GOV STEIN: ICE CRACKDOWN IS 'STOKING FEAR'; CHARLOTTE, NC
